description_long: This is a vintage-style lantern with a tall, narrow body and a rounded base, constructed primarily from dark, weathered metal. The lantern features a prominent wire handle arching over the top, allowing it to be carried or hung. Its central section is enclosed by a glass chamber, which is protected by a crisscrossing metal frame for durability. The top of the lantern has a vented cap, likely for heat dissipation, and the base appears slightly wider to provide stability when placed on a surface. The overall appearance suggests it is an oil lamp, commonly used in outdoor or rustic urban settings. The surface shows signs of rust and wear, giving it an aged, utilitarian character.
description: A weathered, metal oil lantern with a glass chamber, protective wire frame, and a large carrying handle. The lantern has a rustic, vintage appearance with visible signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full glass chamber, protective wire frame, and the central handle arching above.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the depth of the lantern and the curvature of the metal supports.
description_view_2: Rear view with the glass chamber still visible, but the metal frame and handle dominate the silhouette.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1 but with slightly different lighting and frame overlap.
